sections.paragraph:
m. pr. part. of the root עוּד.

(1) witness, Pro 19:5, Pro 19:9used also of inanimate things, Gen 31:44, 48 Gen 31:48 Isa 19:20.

(2) testimony, pr. what testifies. עָנָה עֵד בְּ to bear witness against any one, Exo 20:16 Deu 5:17 31:21 .

(3) a prince, pr. commander, legislator, Isa 55:4. [The common meaning, a witness, needs not to be departed from in this passage.]
